ValidationRule.description: Sales CCR Status cannot be changed by users other than Sales Ops and Sys Admin
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NOT($Setup.ShGl_DisableBusinessLogic__c.Disable_CCR_Validation_Rules__c), $Profile.Name <> 'System Administrator', $Profile.Name <> 'Sales Operations', RecordType.Name = 'Sales CCR', ISCHANGED(User__c) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You do not have the access to change CCR Status.
